results.rendered_html:
tuccha 1〉 adj. leer, nichtig, = śūnya  AK. 3,2,6 .  H. 1446 . = alpa, talina 1426 .  HĀR. 122 . = hīna  UṆĀDIK. _im_ ŚKDR.  tucche 'smindraviṇamṛgatṛṣṇārṇavajale  PRAB. 76,12 . tucchaiḥ saha dehena naśvaraiḥ . anarthairarthasaṃkāśaiḥ  BHĀG. P. 7,7,45 . kalevara 14,13 . maithunādi gṛhamedhisukham 9,45 . tucchīkar als nichtig betrachten, geringschätzen: tucchīkṛtasattama 5,10,25 . svarūpatucchīkṛtavigraha 12,1 .
— 2〉 f. ā die Indigopflanze  BHĀVAPR. _im_ ŚKDR. 
— 3〉 n. Spreu  UṆĀDIK. _im_ ŚKDR.  — In der 1sten und 3ten Bed. urspr. wohl = tuṣa, in der 2ten = tutthā.

results.rendered_html:
tuccha a.
1 Empty, void, vain, light.
2 Small, little, trifling.
3 Abandoned, deserted.
4 Low, mean, insignificant, contemptible, worthless.
5 Poor, miserable, wretched.
— cchaṃ Chaff.
Comp.
— druḥ the castor-oil tree.
— dhānyaḥ
— dhānyakaḥ straw, chaff.
